name: page-agent
description: The GUI Agent Living in Your Webpage. Control web interfaces with natural language.
key_features: Easy integration - No browser extension / python / headless browser required
Text-based DOM manipulation - No screenshots, no multi-modal LLMs
Bring your own LLMs - Use your preferred language model
use_cases: SaaS AI Copilot - Ship an AI copilot in your product
Smart Form Filling - Turn 20-click workflows into one sentence
Accessibility - Make any web app accessible through natural language
Multi-page Agent - Extend web agent reach across browser tabs
MCP - Allow agent clients to control your browser
acknowledgments: browser-use - DOM processing components and prompt derived from browser-use by Gregor Zunic
